name: Florida Coleslaw (Florida Cooking)
recipeIngredient: Onions or scallions (3, tops sliced very thin)
Dried dillweed (1 1/2 teaspoons) or fresh dill minced (2 tablespoons)
Vegetable oil or olive oil (2 tablespoons)
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the cabbage fine using a sharp knife or food processor.
2. Remove the core; discard if it is bitter, keep if it is sweet.
3. In a medium-sized bowl, combine the shredded cabbage with sliced onions, dill, salt, pepper, and vinegar.
4. Toss lightly to mix.
5. Add oil and mayonnaise, then toss again.
6. Cover the bowl and chill for 1 hour before serving.
